description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult male pedestrian with a muscular build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. The figure is minimally clothed, wearing only fitted shorts that cover the upper thighs and waist. The skin surface is smooth and anatomically detailed, with visible musculature and natural body proportions. The head features short, styled hair, and the facial features are well-defined, including a prominent brow and jawline. The feet are bare, and the hands are relaxed with fingers slightly apart. The overall appearance suggests a generic, athletic adult male suitable for urban environments.
description: A muscular adult male figure in fitted shorts, standing upright with arms outstretched in a T-pose, featuring short hair and bare feet.
description_view_0: Front view showing the chest, face, and outstretched arms with relaxed hands and visible abdominal muscles.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, chest, and the straight alignment of the legs and arms.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back muscles, shoulder blades, and the back of the head and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, chest, and the straight alignment of the legs and arms.
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
